lines.english: Lesson 7
lines.chinese: 第7课
lines.raw: Lesson 7 | 第7课

lines.english: Mutilated Ladies
lines.chinese: 残损的钞票
lines.raw: Mutilated Ladies | 残损的钞票

lines.english: Why did Jane cook John's wallet?
lines.chinese: 简为什么要烹调约翰的钱包？
lines.raw: Why did Jane cook John's wallet? | 简为什么要烹调约翰的钱包？

lines.english: Has it ever happened to you?
lines.chinese: 你有过这种经历吗？
lines.raw: Has it ever happened to you? | 你有过这种经历吗？

lines.english: Have you ever put your trousers in the washing machine and then remembered there was a large bank note in your back pocket?
lines.chinese: 你是否曾经把裤子放进洗衣机里，然后才想起你的后裤袋里有一张大额钞票？
lines.raw: Have you ever put your trousers in the washing machine and then remembered there was a large bank note in your back pocket? | 你是否曾经把裤子放进洗衣机里，然后才想起你的后裤袋里有一张大额钞票？

lines.english: When you rescued your trousers, did you find the note was whiter than white?
lines.chinese: 当你把裤子拿出来时，是否发现那张钞票比雪还白？
lines.raw: When you rescued your trousers, did you find the note was whiter than white? | 当你把裤子拿出来时，是否发现那张钞票比雪还白？

lines.english: People who live in Britain needn't despair when they make mistakes like this (and a lot of people do)!
lines.chinese: 在英国居住的人们犯了这种错误不必绝望（而且很多人都会犯这种错误）！
lines.raw: People who live in Britain needn't despair when they make mistakes like this (and a lot of people do)! | 在英国居住的人们犯了这种错误不必绝望（而且很多人都会犯这种错误）！

lines.english: Fortunately for them, the Bank of England has a team called Mutilated Ladies
lines.chinese: 对他们来说幸运的是，英格兰银行有一个名为“残钞处理小组”的团队，
lines.raw: Fortunately for them, the Bank of England has a team called Mutilated Ladies | 对他们来说幸运的是，英格兰银行有一个名为“残钞处理小组”的团队，

lines.english: which deals with claims from people who fed their money to a machine or to their dog.
lines.chinese: 处理那些把钱喂给机器或喂给狗的人提出的索赔。
lines.raw: which deals with claims from people who fed their money to a machine or to their dog. | 处理那些把钱喂给机器或喂给狗的人提出的索赔。

lines.english: Dogs, it seems, love to chew up money!
lines.chinese: 看来狗很喜欢嚼钱！
lines.raw: Dogs, it seems, love to chew up money! | 看来狗很喜欢嚼钱！

lines.english: A recent case concerns Jane Butlin whose fiance, John, runs a successful furniture business.
lines.chinese: 最近有一件事是关于简·巴特林，她的未婚夫约翰经营着一家成功的家具公司。
lines.raw: A recent case concerns Jane Butlin whose fiance, John, runs a successful furniture business. | 最近有一件事是关于简·巴特林，她的未婚夫约翰经营着一家成功的家具公司。

lines.english: John had a very good day and put his wallet containing ￡3, 000 into the microwave oven for safekeeping.
lines.chinese: 约翰那天生意很好，就把装有3000英镑的钱包放进了微波炉里，以求安全。
lines.raw: John had a very good day and put his wallet containing ￡3, 000 into the microwave oven for safekeeping. | 约翰那天生意很好，就把装有3000英镑的钱包放进了微波炉里，以求安全。

lines.english: Then he and Jane went horse-riding.
lines.chinese: 然后他和简去骑马了。
lines.raw: Then he and Jane went horse-riding. | 然后他和简去骑马了。

lines.english: When they got home, Jane cooked their dinner in the microwave oven and without realizing it, cooked her fiance's wallet as well.
lines.chinese: 他们到家后，简在微波炉里做了晚餐，并且在不知不觉中，也把她未婚夫的钱包给煮了。
lines.raw: When they got home, Jane cooked their dinner in the microwave oven and without realizing it, cooked her fiance's wallet as well. | 他们到家后，简在微波炉里做了晚餐，并且在不知不觉中，也把她未婚夫的钱包给煮了。

lines.english: Imagine their dismay when they found a beautifully-cooked wallet and notes turned to ash!
lines.chinese: 想象一下当他们发现一个“烹调精美”的钱包和变成灰烬的钞票时，他们的沮丧！
lines.raw: Imagine their dismay when they found a beautifully-cooked wallet and notes turned to ash! | 想象一下当他们发现一个“烹调精美”的钱包和变成灰烬的钞票时，他们的沮丧！

lines.english: John went to see his bank manager who sent the remains of wallet and the money
lines.chinese: 约翰去见了银行经理，经理把钱包和钱的残余部分
lines.raw: John went to see his bank manager who sent the remains of wallet and the money | 约翰去见了银行经理，经理把钱包和钱的残余部分

lines.english: to the special department of the Bank of England in Newcastle: the Mutilated Ladies!
lines.chinese: 送到了英格兰银行在纽卡斯尔的特别部门：残钞处理小组！
lines.raw: to the special department of the Bank of England in Newcastle: the Mutilated Ladies! | 送到了英格兰银行在纽卡斯尔的特别部门：残钞处理小组！

lines.english: They examined the remains and John got all his money back.
lines.chinese: 他们检查了残余物，约翰拿回了他所有的钱。
lines.raw: They examined the remains and John got all his money back. | 他们检查了残余物，约翰拿回了他所有的钱。

lines.english: 'So long as there's something to identify, we will give people their money back,' said a spokeswoman for the Bank.
lines.chinese: “只要有可识别的部分，我们就会把钱还给人们，”银行的一位女发言人说。
lines.raw: 'So long as there's something to identify, we will give people their money back,' said a spokeswoman for the Bank. | “只要有可识别的部分，我们就会把钱还给人们，”银行的一位女发言人说。

lines.english: 'Last year, we paid ￡1.5 million on 21,000 claims.'
lines.chinese: “去年，我们为21000份索赔支付了150万英镑。”
lines.raw: 'Last year, we paid ￡1.5 million on 21,000 claims.' | “去年，我们为21000份索赔支付了150万英镑。”
